name: Maple Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over very low heat, heat sugars, undiluted milk, and corn syrup until boiling, stirring constantly.
2. Place candy thermometer in the mixture and continue cooking, stirring constantly, until the temperature reaches 235°F or until a small amount of mixture dropped into cold water forms a soft ball (about 30 minutes).
3. Remove the candy mixture from heat.
4. Beat butter, maple flavor, and nuts into the mixture with a spoon.
5. Drop the mixture by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper and cool on wire racks.
The recipe can be prepared up to 1 week in advance. It makes 24 pieces or 3/4 pound. Each serving contains 117 calories.
